Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 25%. Increase range by 10%. Black ZeroSteel x400n/a
2Increase rate of fire by 10%. Increase projectile speed by 10%. Black ZeroSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 40%. Increase radius by 15%. Increase trigger radius by 20%. Increase the debuff duration by 4 seconds.Black Zero LargeSteel x1600n/a
4Increase rate of fire by 10%. Increase range by 10%. Reduce power consumption by 20%.Black Zero LargeSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 33%. Increase projectile speed by 10%. Black Zero LargeSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 64%. Increase radius by 25%. Increase range by 20%. Increase trigger radius by 30%. Increase the debuff duration by 4 seconds.Black Zero HugeSteel x12800Iridium x800
